bead.title: Implement axon backend behind selectable backend flag in cli/internal/bead
bead.description: Implement an axon-backed Backend in cli/internal/bead/, selectable at runtime via DDX_BEAD_BACKEND or .ddx/config.yaml (e.g., bead.backend: jsonl|axon). Must satisfy the same Backend interface JSONL currently satisfies: create/show/update/close/list/ready/blocked/dep ops, plus claim semantics and event append. Follows the TD authored in the design child. Existing JSONL path remains the default; data migration is a separate child bead.
bead.acceptance: 1. Axon Backend implementation lives in cli/internal/bead/ alongside the JSONL backend. 2. Selectable via DDX_BEAD_BACKEND or config; JSONL remains default. 3. All Backend interface methods implemented. 4. Unit tests cover create/claim/close/dep on the axon backend. 5. ddx bead commands work end-to-end against the axon backend on a fresh repo (no migration required).
